title: Senior Doctor - Roche India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Roche India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Roche India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Roche India:
Roche India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Roche India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
